name: Sweet Potato Pancakes
snippet: We love Sweet Potatoes!  We bake them, roast them, steam them, mash them, pan fry them, you name it!  They are a staple in our diets and a fixed item on our shopping list.  We enjoy them as a side dish, but they are also a smart choice for baking because of their natural sweetness.  I can tell you, they surely do not disappoint in this version of clean pancakes.  Try it for yourself!
